languages.text: "Новые лица в моей лавочке! Какое счастье! Я — глава Гильдии Оружейников Футфола, все зовут меня Дядюшка Райнхельд! Желаете взглянуть на лучшие пушки станции?"

traits.locale_text: "Новые лица в моей лавочке! Какое счастье! Я — глава Гильдии Оружейников Футфола, все зовут меня Дядюшка Райнхельд! Желаете взглянуть на лучшие пушки станции?"

languages.text: "Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"
languages.original_text: "Новые лица в моей лавочке! Какое счастье! Я — глава Гильдии Оружейников Футфола, все зовут меня Дядюшка Райнхельд! Желаете взглянуть на лучшие пушки станции?"

traits.locale_text: "Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armorers' Guild, everyone calls me Uncle Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"
"Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armorers' Guild, everyone calls me Uncle Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"
"Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"
"Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"
"Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"

languages.text: « C'est toujours un plaisir de voir de nouveaux visages dans ma boutique ! Je suis le dirigeant de la guilde des armuriers de Castel, tout le monde m'appelle le vieux Reinheld ! Voulez-vous que je vous montre les meilleures armes à feu de la station ? »
languages.original_text: "Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"

traits.locale_text: « C'est toujours un plaisir de voir de nouveaux visages dans ma boutique ! Je suis le dirigeant de la guilde des armuriers de Castel, tout le monde m'appelle le vieux Reinheld ! Voulez-vous que je vous montre les meilleures armes à feu de la station ? »

languages.text: "Frische Gesichter in meinem Laden! Das ist ein freudiger Anlass! Ich bin das Oberhaupt der Waffenschmiedegilde von Footfall, alle nennen mich den alten Reinheld! Wollt ihr die besten Waffen des Bahnhofs sehen?"
languages.original_text: "Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"

traits.locale_text: "Frische Gesichter in meinem Laden! Das ist ein freudiger Anlass! Ich bin das Oberhaupt der Waffenschmiedegilde von Footfall, alle nennen mich den alten Reinheld! Wollt ihr die besten Waffen des Bahnhofs sehen?"

languages.text: "¡Caras frescas en mi tienda! ¡Esta es una ocasión de alegría! Soy el jefe del gremio de armeros de Footfall, ¡todos me llaman Viejo Reinheld! ¿Queréis ver las mejores armas de la estación?"
languages.original_text: "Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"

traits.locale_text: "¡Caras frescas en mi tienda! ¡Esta es una ocasión de alegría! Soy el jefe del gremio de armeros de Footfall, ¡todos me llaman Viejo Reinheld! ¿Queréis ver las mejores armas de la estación?"

languages.text: "Dükkanımda yeni yüzler! Bu sevinçli bir olay! Ben Footfall Zırhçılar Loncası'nın başkanıyım, herkes bana Yaşlı Reinheld der! İstasyondaki en iyi silahları görmek ister misiniz?"
languages.original_text: "Fresh faces in my shop! This is a joyous occasion! I'm the head of the Footfall Armourers' Guild, everyone calls me Old Reinheld! Would you like to see the best guns on the station?"

traits.locale_text: "Dükkanımda yeni yüzler! Bu sevinçli bir olay! Ben Footfall Zırhçılar Loncası'nın başkanıyım, herkes bana Yaşlı Reinheld der! İstasyondaki en iyi silahları görmek ister misiniz?"
